name: Serverless Function
description: Hierarchical structure of a serverless function deployed on scalable PaaS platforms including Vercel, Netlify, Cloudflare Workers, Heroku, Fly.io, Railway, and Render.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Function name used in deployment and URL routing.

fields.name: platform
fields.description: Hosting platform (vercel, netlify, cloudflare-workers, heroku, fly-io, railway, render, northflank).

fields.name: runtime
fields.description: Execution runtime (nodejs18, nodejs20, python3.12, go1.21, deno, bun, edge-runtime, workerd).

fields.name: handler
fields.description: Entry point file path or exported function name.

fields.name: route
fields.description: URL path pattern that routes requests to this function.

fields.name: region
fields.description: Deployment region or 'edge' for global distribution.

fields.name: timeoutSeconds
fields.description: Maximum execution time in seconds before termination.

fields.name: scaleToZero
fields.description: Whether the function scales to zero between invocations.

fields.name: triggers
fields.description: Invocation triggers (http, cron, queue, event, webhook).

fields.name: type
fields.description: Trigger type (http, cron, queue, event, webhook).

fields.name: method
fields.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, ANY).

fields.name: deployedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the most recent deployment.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current function status (active, deploying, failed, paused).
